parts.text: Educational flat cartoon illustration, horizontal card banner 16:9, middle school scene "学习2-课程". Theme: 学习. Setting: 课程. Color palette: warm orange and blue. Scene composition: One classroom lesson: students sit together at a group table. A school news board on the wall, a student filling a form, math equations on the whiteboard, a level/progress chart, one student thinking with a question mark (doubt). All in ONE continuous classroom view. LAYOUT — CRITICAL: Draw ONE single unified continuous scene (one room, one moment). FORBIDDEN: grid layout, split panels, comic strip, storyboard frames, collage of separate cards, isolated vignettes per word. All 6 vocabulary concepts must be woven into this SAME scene as connected objects and actions: level, form, doubt, math, news, group. Word labels — each word gets a LARGE English label on a white rounded pill badge with bold dark navy sans-serif text and subtle shadow. Place each label INSIDE the unified scene, next to its matching object (use thin leader lines if needed). Required labels: "level" (bold label on white rounded pill badge placed IN the scene next to its object); "form" (bold label on white rounded pill badge placed IN the scene next to its object); "doubt" (bold label on white rounded pill badge placed IN the scene next to its object); "math" (bold label on white rounded pill badge placed IN the scene next to its object); "news" (bold label on white rounded pill badge placed IN the scene next to its object); "group" (bold label on white rounded pill badge placed IN the scene next to its object). Each word appears exactly once. Clean minimalist cartoon style, friendly for teens. No Chinese text, no extra vocabulary words.
